stories.title: World Cup updates: France take on Morocco in first...
Clips-Raptors trade for Kawhi on hold amid probe
stories.summary: The Clippers-Raptors trade involving Kawhi Leonard will not be completed until the NBA probe into whether the Clippers circumvented the salary cap is completed.

stories.title: Top '27 recruit Spears Jr. reclassifies, picks Tex...
stories.summary: Marcus Spears Jr., the No. 1 prospect in the class of 2027, is reclassifying and committing to Texas for the upcoming college basketball season, he told ESPN on Thursday.

stories.title: England's Quansah gets 2-game ban for red card
stories.summary: England full-back Jarell Quansah has been suspended for two matches after receiving a red card in his side's World Cup round-of-16 win over Mexico.

stories.title: Sources: UCLA lands possible top NBA draft pick
stories.summary: Nikola Kusturica has reached a multiyear agreement to play for UCLA, giving the Bruins an early contender for the No. 1 pick in the 2028 NBA draft.
